### Post by jamesakerr on 2013-07-09
I am running Ububtu 13.04 and have recently received this error message when the updater runs.  Does anyone have any ideas on how to fix this?

[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/image/png;base64,[/IMG]

---

### Post by dino99 on 2013-07-09
that error often popup; its due to index not fully synced; but no worry its harmless, simply retry.
